title: croton gossypiifolius var. heterophyllus
intro: Croton gossypiifolius var. heterophyllus, also known as the cotton leaf croton or wild cotton, is a variety of the Croton gossypiifolius plant, characterized by its unique leaves resembling cotton leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Croton gossypiifolius var. heterophyllus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tea and infusions, are commonly used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
